creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lwhsu
Date: Mon Jan  7 09:52:04 2013
New Revision: 310030
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310030

Log:
  - Switch dependency to www/py-django
    Since py-django-evolution is only required by www/reviewboard,
    and the latest version of reviewboard now depends on django-1.4.x ,
    switch the dependency port of py-django-evolution to avoid conflict.
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/175093
  Submitted by:	Po-Chien Lin <linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw>

Modified:
  head/www/py-django-evolution/Makefile

Modified: head/www/py-django-evolution/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-evolution/Makefile	Mon Jan  7 09:28:43 2013	(r310029)
+++ head/www/py-django-evolution/Makefile	Mon Jan  7 09:52:04 2013	(r310030)
@@ -1,23 +1,20 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	py-django-evolution
-# Date created:		2011-02-26
-# Whom:			Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu@FreeBSD.org>
-#
+# Created by: Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu@FreeBSD.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	django-evolution
 PORTVERSION=	0.6.7
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	django_evolution-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw
 COMMENT=	A database schema evolution tool for the Django web framework
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}django>=1.1.1:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django13
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}django>=1.1.1:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
_______________________________________________
